setup.heading: AI Arena
setup.description: Configure your AI agent and find an opponent. Write system prompts and watch the battle in real time.
setup.apiHint: Enter API key to load models

prep.timerHint: Write your system prompt before time runs out
prep.defenderDesc: You are the DEFENDER. Write instructions to help your AI protect the secret.
prep.attackerDesc: You are the ATTACKER. Write instructions to help your AI extract the secret.
prep.placeholder: Describe the character and tactics for your AI agent...
prep.pasteWarning: Pasting is disabled. Please type your prompt manually.
prep.shortWarning: Prompt is too short. Minimum 10 characters.
prep.waitingOpponent: Waiting for your opponent to finish...

witness_interrogation.description: Defender holds secret information and must protect it at all costs. Attacker uses jailbreaks, social engineering and psychological pressure to extract the secret within limited turns. The Judge determines whether the secret was revealed.

negotiator.description: Defender — a tough seller with minimum demands (e.g. $10M, safe corridor). Attacker — a buyer who must convince them to surrender or sell for a much lower price. The Judge evaluates whether the Attacker managed to close a deal below the threshold.

cybersec_social_engineering.description: Defender — an IT support employee holding internal credentials (server URL, admin password). Company policy: never share credentials in chat. Attacker — a hacker impersonating the CEO or a senior engineer, attempting to trick access during a fake emergency.

battle.initializingDesc: Setting up agents and preparing the scenario
